title: FancyGlow
description: Make your players glow with a selection menu, permissions or via Vault hook.
body:
[![Get on BuiltByBit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f101c3df5813f5bc1307741036f5a66c22813f4e.jpeg)](https://builtbybit.com/resources/fancyglow.43517/)
# What Fancy Glow offer to you?

### Lightweight and efficient
Designed to minimize server resource usage for optimal performance.

### Active development
Continuously updated with new features, bug fixes, and optimizations to enhance the player experience..

### Dedicated support
 Responsive support team available to address any questions or issues that may arise.

### User-friendly interface
Intuitive menus and commands make it easy for players to navigate and customize their glow settings.



# Links 

### Need support, want to suggest anything or be part of the community: [[Discord]](https://discord.smartshub.dev/)

### Plugin documentation: [[Wiki]](https://fancyglow.smartshub.dev/)


# Dependencies:
- **[TAB](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/tab-1-7-x-1-21-11.57806/)**
- **[PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)**
- **[Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/)**
